content:
"In today's festivities I saw a creature leading the procession, and proceeded to see her come into this humble home, tell me of her."

"No one is permitted to see our beloved Herse without some form of payment. Not even a god, not even Jove himself. Dare you not to cross this threshold."

"Do you think that it is as easy as a few simple words to deter me from my determination to have all things that I want when I want them under what terms I want them delivered? You know my face, my stature--I beg you: step aside. My presence is reward enough for you, most protective tertiary sister."

"These are the words of my sister, my lord."

She did not budge, no, she stayed and stood steadfast. But the trouble she offered was not of the air of protection but of the much fouler stink of envy. Her sister Herse was worth all the gold and spoils I could afford and even more than I could afford. I did not fix myself to failure nor did I fix my robes for perfection in vain. Instead of collapsing this house and home and the sisters inside still leaving me with little but momentary satisfaction I will play the game she wants to lead me into ever so foolishly. I will rich her with riches.
